text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Written retrospectively due to full emergency room.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Clear airways Eupnoeic, bilateral chest expansion, no respiratory sounds, RF 15 breaths/min, SpO2 94% on room air.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Valid and rhythmic pulses, HR 80 bpm, BP 170/85 mmHg, patent CVP present.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Patient slow in manner, cooperative and calm, pupils equal and round, apyretic.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Normal skin color and temperature.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Diagnostics performed + neurological consultation.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Patient does not have mobile, dental or acoustic prostheses.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Transferred to the hospital for continued treatment.", 0.0, 0.5)
